rubric: Names at least 6 Chinese LLM companies or models (e.g., Qwen, DeepSeek, Baichuan, Yi, Zhipu, Kimi)
Includes benchmark scores or rankings for at least 3 Chinese models
Covers at least 2 Chinese open-source LLMs with GitHub or download data
Mentions government policy or regulation affecting Chinese AI
Includes funding or valuation data for at least 2 Chinese AI companies
Covers at least 2 Chinese-language sources (Zhihu, 36kr, etc.)
Mentions at least 2 application areas where Chinese LLMs are deployed
Compares Chinese LLMs vs Western LLMs on at least 2 dimensions
Identifies at least 1 trend in the Chinese AI ecosystem
Discusses competitive dynamics between Chinese AI companies
Every model or company includes a URL
Uses at least 3 distinct source types
